name: opencode-context-filter
notes: HTTP reverse proxy (Python 3.6+, stdlib only, localhost:11435→Ollama:11434) that intercepts /v1/chat/completions and applies regex stripping to system prompt for small models (llama3.2:1b, qwen2.5:1.5b). Removes: <project> repo tree (10-50k tokens), full <env> section, AGENTS.md and instruction files. Replaces with minimal <env> stub. NOT cache-safe: destructively rewrites request body in-flight before model sees it. Target: OpenCode + Ollama local-only deployments with sub-2B models. Claimed 99% context reduction (45k→200 tokens) and 8x inference speedup. No external deps, single-threaded (~10 req/s). Model list and ports are hardcoded in source. Niche: local small-model use case only, not relevant to hosted API token optimization. Wrapper script starts proxy via nohup before launching OpenCode.
